footer.joinUs: Join us in shaping tomorrow with innovative design and technology.

header.title: Unleash Your Creativity with 3D Innovation
header.description: Tokspace empowers creators in Indonesia with cutting-edge 3D printing technology and modular design kits. Join our community of innovators and bring your ideas to life.

contactUs.title: Get in Touch
contactUs.subtitle: We'd love to hear from you!
contactUs.successMessage: Message sent successfully! We'll get back to you soon.
contactUs.errorMessage: Failed to send message. Please try again later.

creativity.title: Unleash Your Creativity
creativity.subtitle: Explore our innovative modular kits and storytelling tools.
creativity.createDescription: Discover how our tools empower your creative journey and inspire innovation.
creativity.craftDescription: Join us in shaping the future of storytelling.
creativity.experienceDescription: Embrace technology to elevate your creative projects.
creativity.inspireDescription: Collaborate and innovate with our vibrant community.
creativity.imagineDescription: Let your imagination soar with our cutting-edge tools and resources.

ourMission.title: Our Mission: Creativity Meets Technology in Indonesia
ourMission.subtitle: Empowering local creators through technology and community.
ourMission.explorationDescription: Try new ideas, themes, and tech. Never static.
ourMission.communityDescription: Make people feel part of a bigger story.
ourMission.curiosityTitle: Have something in mind? Share it!
ourMission.curiosityDescription: Teach, show, and share — not just sell.

steppers.title: Discover How Local Creators Innovate with Us
steppers.subtitle: Join us on a journey through the creative process. Watch how local creators harness our technology to bring their visions to life.
steppers.step1Description: Creators brainstorm ideas and sketch their concepts, laying the groundwork for innovation.
steppers.step2Description: Using our tools, creators transform sketches into digital designs ready for 3D printing.
steppers.step3Description: Creators print prototypes, testing functionality and aesthetics to refine their products before launch.

notFound.description: It seems the page you're looking for has launched into the cosmos. Let's get you home.

shopProduct.title: Discover Our Innovative 3D-Printed Products
shopProduct.description: Explore a world where creativity meets technology. Our unique offerings empower local entrepreneurs to bring their visions to life.

productCTA.heading: Ready to Bring Your Vision Into Reality?
productCTA.description: Contact us today for custom projects tailored to your unique needs and aspirations.

buyProduct.heading: Fidgeting Toy
buyProduct.description: This small keychain is more than just an accessory—it's a piece of your narrative. Carry it everywhere to express yourself or simply keep it as a cherished companion.
buyProduct.listItem1: Perfect for focus and self-expression on the go.
buyProduct.listItem2: A pocket-sized friend for your daily adventures.
buyProduct.listItem3: Designed for creativity and personal connection.
buyProduct.tabDetailsDescription: Our keychains are crafted with care, ensuring durability and style. Each piece is a unique expression of your personality. Enjoy a seamless shopping experience with our easy returns policy.
buyProduct.tabShippingDescription: Depending on where you are located, shipping might take 1-2 weeks
buyProduct.tabReturnsDescription: Currently, we don't process any returns. If, however, your product run into any issue please do contact us.
